info.name: SaccoSphere API
info.description:
SaccoSphere API Collection - v1.0.0

Base URL: http://localhost:8000

Authentication: JWT Bearer Token

request.description: Basic liveness check to verify the API is running
Checks if the API is ready to accept requests (database and cache)
Register a new user account
Authenticate user and receive JWT tokens
Logout user and blacklist refresh token
Obtain JWT access and refresh tokens
Refresh access token using refresh token
Get authenticated user's profile information
Update authenticated user's profile information
Change authenticated user's password
Submit national ID number for IPRS verification
Upload KYC document (ID front, ID back, passport, or Huduma)
Get authenticated user's KYC verification status
List available SACCOs with filtering and search
Get detailed information about a specific SACCO
Send OTP code to user's phone number
Verify OTP code and update user's phone number
Resend OTP code (with cooldown period)
Request password reset via OTP
Confirm password reset with OTP
List authenticated user's SACCO memberships
Apply for SACCO membership
Get detailed information about a specific membership
Leave a SACCO membership
Get custom field definitions for a SACCO
Assign a role to a user (SUPER_ADMIN only)
Revoke a role from a user (SUPER_ADMIN only)
List all roles for a specific user
List members of the current SACCO (SACCO_ADMIN only)
Get detailed member information with savings and loans (SACCO_ADMIN only)
Get aggregate dashboard statistics for current SACCO (SACCO_ADMIN only)
Approve or reject a SACCO membership application (SACCO_ADMIN only)
List pending KYC verification records for admin review
Approve or reject a member KYC verification
Update loan status through approval workflow
List system audit logs (SUPER_ADMIN only)
Create an asynchronous SACCO member import job from uploaded file (SACCO_ADMIN only)
Get SACCO-scoped progress and summary for one import job
List savings types
List authenticated user's savings accounts
Get savings breakdown by type for a specific SACCO
List available loan types
Check loan eligibility for a SACCO
Apply for a loan
List authenticated user's loans
Get detailed information about a specific loan
Get or generate repayment schedule for a loan
Search for a possible guarantor for a loan
Request a member to guarantee a loan
Approve or decline a guarantor request
List authenticated user's payment transactions
Get detailed information about a specific transaction
Get detailed M-Pesa transaction information
Initiate M-Pesa STK push for saving deposit or loan repayment
Get STK transaction status by checkout request ID
Initiate M-Pesa B2C loan disbursement (SACCO_ADMIN only)
Get B2C disbursement status by conversation ID (SACCO_ADMIN only)
List B2C disbursement history for current SACCO (SACCO_ADMIN only)
Create a callback record (testing/debugging)
List ledger entries for user's membership in a SACCO
Get user's current ledger balance in a SACCO
Get paginated ledger statement for a SACCO membership
Download ledger statement as PDF
List notifications for the authenticated user
Mark one notification as read
Mark all notifications for the user as read
Register or reactivate a device token for push notifications
List monthly invoices visible to current SACCO admin or super admin
Retrieve one invoice by ID
Resend existing invoice report to SACCO emails/admin recipients
Download invoice report as CSV or PDF
Get unified member portfolio across SACCO memberships
Get current dashboard state for authenticated member
List SACCO switcher cards for authenticated member
Get member activity feed entries
Compare eligible loan options for requested amount and term
